top_categories.workout_context: La Drômoise Gravel's Diois forest fire roads, Vercors foothills (pre-Alps, not forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 43 miles.
Race-pace efforts that mimic La Drômoise Gravel's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before September.
114ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
When someone attacks on diois forest fire roads (pistes forestières) in, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
At La Drômoise Gravel, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At La Drômoise Gravel, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Varied gradients on diois forest fire roads (pistes forestières) in demand climbing versatility. Sit the shallow stuff, stand the steep stuff, switch without thinking.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of La Drômoise Gravel. Train it until it feels boring.
43 miles on diois forest fire roads (pistes forestières) in burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on diois forest fire roads (pistes forestières) in. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Smooth pedaling at 43 miles saves muscle. Bad technique at mile 10 is invisible. At mile 80 it's a cramp.
Low-cadence force work for 4,921ft of climbing. The slow, grinding ascents where you can't spin—you push.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for La Drômoise Gravel’s 43 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at La Drômoise Gravel. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at La Drômoise Gravel requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on diois forest fire roads (pistes forestières) in the vercors foothills to build confidence. Expect: diois forest fire roads, vercors foothills (pre-alps, not high alps), vineyard passages.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Gravel Specific, Race Simulation, and TT Threshold to prepare you for 43 miles of diois forest fire roads (pistes forestières) in the vercors foothills in Die, Drôme, France.
